ORDER AWARDING ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS, AND AMENDING JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATSON, STEVEN T. CROCKER, ARMEL A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 BURNETT AVE, APT. #306 $4,300.00 RENT, $18,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $632.88 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,932.88, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTY. FEES & COSTS PER COST BILL; PLTF. WILL NOT EXECUTE UPON THE JUDGMENT SO LONG AS DEFTS' PAY MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF NO LESS THAN $430.00 PER MONTH PLUS 10% OF ANY SUBSEQUENT AWARD OF COSTS & ATTY. FEES. PAYMENTS ARE DUE ON OR BEFORE THE 20TH OF EACH MONTH; (SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
